title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: fuse-overlayfs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for fuse-overlayfs is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: FUSE overlay+shiftfs implementation for rootless containers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update fuse-overlayfs to 1.16 [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-128522)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for fuse-overlayfs is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

FUSE overlay+shiftfs implementation for rootless containers.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update fuse-overlayfs to 1.16 [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-128522)
